positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a stylized forest scene. The main subjects are several smiling, friendly woodland animals (foxes, deer, rabbits) engaged in play beneath a glowing, oversized mushroom. The background consists of simplified, layered forest silhouettes and gentle, stylized clouds. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by deep emerald greens, rich sapphire blues, warm terracotta oranges, and glowing mossy yellows. The style should be a highly detailed, flat graphic illustration, reminiscent of professional children's book storybook art, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical for apparel design. Strong contrast between the dark silhouettes and the glowing subject elements. Clean linework, vector art quality, high saturation.
negative: blurry, low resolution, amateur, watermark, logo, text, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, noise, grainy, poor composition, cropped, deep shadows, photorealistic
